summary: Add the selectable, origin-labeled M4 workspace History inspector with exact source-edit details.

decisions.topic: Separate UI history detail from the public MCP history schema
decisions.decision: Publish clone-safe source-edit details through a dedicated runtime store keyed by command ID, render the visible History list newest first with origin and full timestamp identifiers, and keep get_history restricted to the Appendix B entry schema without UI-only before/after source.
decisions.rationale: FR-11.3 requires selectable source diffs and unambiguous command attribution, while the public MCP tool has a narrower normative response and should not gain undocumented source disclosure. A keyed detail store preserves atomic command publication without widening that external contract.

testEvidence.criterion: History is selectable, newest first, origin-labeled, timestamped, and shows exact before/after source for user, AI-panel, and external-agent edits without widening get_history.
testEvidence.test: Exercise runtime detail publication, MCP filtering/order, panel semantics and selection, and live Workbench wiring; correct only observed failures and rerun the affected bounded set.

red.command: pnpm.cmd vitest run tests/ui/mcp/McpReviewPanel.test.tsx tests/ui/Workbench.test.tsx --reporter=dot; independent FR-11.3 review
red.outcome: RED: a pre-existing Workbench history expectation did not account for two later chronological tab-activation commands. Independent review then found repeated same-summary rows insufficiently distinguishable and the outer landmark mislabeled as MCP pending reviews. After the product corrections, one test still used a singular User-badge query although two intentional User rows were present.

green.command: pnpm.cmd vitest run tests/ui/mcp/McpReviewPanel.test.tsx --reporter=dot; pnpm.cmd vitest run tests/application/runtime/workbench-runtime-history.test.ts tests/application/mcp/workbench-mcp-handler.test.ts tests/ui/mcp/McpReviewPanel.test.tsx --reporter=dot; pnpm.cmd lint; pnpm.cmd typecheck; git diff --check
green.outcome: GREEN: the corrected panel passed 1/1; the bounded runtime, MCP, and UI proof passed 3 files/26 tests; Biome/source policy checked 469 files, TypeScript exited 0, diff hygiene passed, and independent re-review returned literal 0 blocker / 0 critical / 0 major / 0 minor / 0 nit.

nearMisses.sought: Adversarial FR-11.3 accessibility, attribution, ordering, and public-contract review
nearMisses.confirmation: Review exposed ambiguity between repeated edit summaries and an incorrect outer landmark label. Full timestamps plus origin in both visible rows and accessible names, and independent History/MCP regions, closed both findings before the zero-severity verdict.

attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
